title: Clutter Prevention Enforcement Suite
description: Integrated enforcement system to prevent repository clutter through four enforcement gates

enforcement_gates.purpose: Ensure all DAGs in .roadmap/ are documented with spec/ files
enforcement_gates.enforcement: Scans .roadmap/ for head.json DAG files and verifies corresponding spec/ documentation exists

enforcement_gates.purpose: Enforce design doc commitment during phases, not at end
enforcement_gates.enforcement: Pre-commit hook blocks untracked .md files in .roadmap/ (except spec/)

enforcement_gates.purpose: Maintain task list quality and prevent stale in-progress tasks
enforcement: Detects invalid task statuses (must be: pending, in_progress, completed)
Flags in_progress tasks not updated in 48+ hours
Requires evidence field on completed tasks

enforcement_gates.purpose: Auto-cleanup stale and orphaned git worktrees
enforcement: Removes worktrees not modified in 7+ days
Runs at session end via post-session-cleanup.sh

acceptance_criteria.evidence: dag-manifest.ts scans .roadmap/ and validates all DAGs have spec files
task-list-validator.ts detects invalid statuses, stale tasks, missing evidence
enforcement-integration.test.ts validates all gates work together
All enforcement modules are read-only or safely re-runnable
Each gate supports environment variable bypass for emergency use

coverage: Edge cases: malformed JSON, missing files, invalid timestamps

deployment.ci_cd_integration: EnforcementSuite.validate() can be called in CI pipelines
dependencies: tsx or node --experimental-strip-types for hook execution

maintenance.monitoring: Use 'roadmap chart' to see clutter prevention status in DAG progress

rollout_plan.phase_1: Pre-commit hook integration — blocks commits that violate clutter rules
rollout_plan.phase_3: CI/CD integration — validate enforcement suite in pipelines
rollout_plan.phase_4: Monitoring and tuning — adjust thresholds based on team feedback
